{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201754195FDCE2533B40042C7769"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607888823612801816","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，不一样的神秘复苏，有自己独特的诡异[已种草][求爆更][雀食神作]唯一的缺点是全篇看完感觉怪怪的，不太流畅"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771355420,"group_id":"7597423430408866840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwaZE+nrEU/ZhqQEqvQiTY3DUIbubeR0JZ5KgFae4gws","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c49243c551c404c96ba3be336fcbc11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536181&x-signature=dpFleah49Xdp2S5DTGV3ZoYbBWE%3D","user_id":"2867958843450829","user_name":"汉斯国的唐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2867958843450829","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597423430408866840","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【惊悚】+【悬疑】+【神秘复苏】+【厉鬼复苏】+【热血】
非黑非白的间隙，斑斓落处，皆是鬼蜮。世界褪去斑斓，唯余黑白，方见厉鬼本相。我的世界只有黑白，当你看到色彩之时，代表厉鬼已经在你身边，不要慌，停下来，细心寻找规律。陆岩送外卖之际，因为二十八块五，被厉鬼诓骗进小区，卷入了灵异事件，驾驭了黑白鬼眼，经历了一系列生死挑战终于逃出生天，当陆岩厉鬼复苏寻找驾驭第二只鬼平衡之时，却发现自己突然不知道驾驭了什么厉鬼，导致他一直在厉鬼复苏的边缘挣扎。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o374e70b0c2904ddaf22b9deefeb5ed3f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"苦苦的寻","author_id":"","book_id":"7597423430408866840","book_name":"灵异复苏：我驾驭了黑白鬼眼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1054人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597423803995521560","read_count":"1054","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"286658"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"132","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o374e70b0c2904ddaf22b9deefeb5ed3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184459&x-signature=LC8MKrOZOKOGLHJ3QV%2FAHoM0NbU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"377868016434318","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"96"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201754195FDCE2533B40042C7769"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8412,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":568},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771356902,"author_reply_time":1771357584,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607352782853980953","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实很多评论都符合这本书但你若不动脑子看的话，这是一本还不错的书但是我是看到有一点是真无语了，我个人是不怎么喜欢一些小说的，因为好吧，没那么多，因为就是不喜欢我原以为这本书是个无女主文厄三科到75章的时候主角和一个女子搞上了就是列车上发现了狗一世界呢主角解决了也不算解决了吧反正不好解释然后这个女生呢就倒贴上来了原因无他他不想再有这种毫无力量感觉朱姐问他是不是想要做遇鬼者不是他说他要做附庸然后就开始挑拨起主角了主角枕上了其实这点也没啥但我怕后面给我整后宫。所以暂且不看了，看到后面的人给我解释解释后面内容是啥，有没有真后宫？没啥可说的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771228965,"group_id":"7597423430408866840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"普通人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2q/20ph9taWY6jQzWmsBxTK4IphYsHgsedXZiLFXiVK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/573151d5d06242c59bf91599d7a948da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534959&x-signature=vVe8Y7zjNe2Fky80k%2BeeZFviqiA%3D","user_id":"1613709883227165","user_name":"八卦阵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1613709883227165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1650762480,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597423430408866840","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【惊悚】+【悬疑】+【神秘复苏】+【厉鬼复苏】+【热血】
